summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Human Resources professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing people programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining {ex|operations} and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate {prog|listening sessions} to analyze needs of 25+ global stakeholders, resulting in 3 new learning programs best aligned with organizational goals
Lead {coord|communications strategy} for 20+ concurrent programs, coordinating vendors and tracking {data|completion metrics} to drive a 78% program enrollment rate
Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ projects, utilizing {data|feedback loops} to optimize operational strategies and {ex|employee engagement}
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, refuting cost assumptions via evidence-based insights
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Synthesized {data|2,000+ employee survey responses} to provide C-suite reporting on engagement drivers and workforce satisfaction trends
Provide reporting & insights by transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed {prog|training} and engagement strategies for leadership
Delivered {prog|leadership training} presentations on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance evaluations to senior leadership
Delivered {ex|5 cross-functional projects} on survey development, rewards & recognition, and employee experience initiatives
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership {prog|workshop} for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Streamlined {ex|onboarding processes} across 3 global locations by conducting gap analyses and clarifying job responsibilities
Delivered {coord|strategic HR solutions} for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Developed proficiency across {ex|HR functions} including {coord|recruitment, compensation}, and performance management
Drafted job descriptions, posted openings, and maintained {tools|ATS} records across international {cross|talent} pipelines
Engaged global talent via personalized communication, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized campus recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite executives at top universities
